nasb.text: with one of which the black horses are going forth to the north country; and the white ones go forth after them, while the dappled ones go forth to the south country.

esv.text: The chariot with the black horses goes toward the north country, the white ones go after them, and the dappled ones go toward the south country.”

cnv.text: 套著黑馬的車出來，往北方之地去；套著白馬的車出來，跟在牠們後面；套著有斑點的馬的車出來，往南方之地去。

ccb.text: 套着黑马的车前往北方，套着白马的车前往西方，套着斑点马的车前往南方。
